contentList.content: Misty Step Plus Chest
An exquisitely-crafted chest, ornamented with gems and lined with cushioned velvet.
Underwear of Misty Step Plus
Fly+
Lite Prayer of Healing+
Grants the ability to AoE Heal and apply Lesser Restoration out of combat
Misty Step+
Surrounded by silver mist, you teleport to an unoccupied space you can see.
Fly+
Grant the ability to fly for yourself or an ally
Speak with Animals
Gain the ability to comprehend and communicate with beasts.
Lite Prayer of Healing+
Grants the ability to AoE Heal and apply Lesser Restoration out of combat
Misty Step+
Speak with Animals
Gain the ability to comprehend and communicate with beasts.
Surrounded by silver mist, you teleport to an unoccupied space you can see.
Grant the ability to fly for yourself or an ally
This pair of underwear all that's left of a mighty band of assiassins' armour. Whoever possesses it is granted but a fraction of the power afforded by the full set. Hand wash only.
